description: Enflow MVP — White-label agency client portal with Supabase auth, Drive integration, and report embeds

userStories.title: Tailwind design system + CSS variables setup
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
Google Fonts (Bricolage Grotesque 700, Instrument Sans 400/500) load
CSS variables for brand theming exist in globals.css (--brand-primary, --brand-accent, etc.)
Tailwind configured with Enflow brand tokens (colors, fonts, spacing)

userStories.title: Supabase client + env setup
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/lib/supabase/client.ts exports a createClient function (browser client)
src/lib/supabase/server.ts exports a createClient function (server client)
.env.local.example contains NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
@supabase/supabase-js and @supabase/ssr are installed in package.json

userStories.title: Database schema SQL migration
acceptanceCriteria: supabase/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql exists
SQL file contains CREATE TABLE for all 7 tables: plan_tiers, agencies, agency_users, clients, drive_folders, report_embeds, notifications
SQL file contains RLS policies: agency users see only their agency's data, clients see only their data
SQL file contains seed INSERT statements for 3 plan tiers (Starter, Growth, Pro)

userStories.title: TypeScript types for database schema
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/types/database.ts exports interfaces for PlanTier, Agency, AgencyUser, Client, DriveFolder, ReportEmbed, Notification
src/types/index.ts barrel export exists and re-exports all types

userStories.title: Auth middleware + route protection
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/middleware.ts exists with Supabase auth session refresh logic
Matcher config covers /dashboard/* and /portal/* routes
Unauthenticated users are redirected to /login

userStories.title: Login page
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/app/login/page.tsx renders with email + password form
Form submits to Supabase auth signInWithPassword
Dark background (#060909), teal accents, and Enflow branding applied
Error states and loading states are handled

userStories.title: Agency dashboard layout (sidebar + header)
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/app/dashboard/layout.tsx renders with sidebar navigation and header
Sidebar contains links for Clients, Branding, Settings
Header shows agency name, user avatar/menu, and logout
Dark sidebar (#1A3A3A) and off-white content area (#EDEEED) colors applied
Layout is responsive and sidebar collapses at 375px

userStories.title: Client portal layout
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/app/portal/layout.tsx renders with clean minimal layout
Top nav contains links for Files, Reports, Notifications, Settings
Agency branding injected via CSS variables
Layout is mobile responsive

userStories.title: Agency dashboard — client list page
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/app/dashboard/page.tsx fetches clients from Supabase scoped by agency_id
Client list renders with name, contact, invite status, and services tags
Empty state component is shown when no clients exist

userStories.title: Add client modal + Supabase invite
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
Add client modal renders with all fields: name, contact_name, contact_email, phone, services, retainer_value, contract_start_date, campaign_goals, internal_notes
Form validates required fields before submission
On submit, creates client record in Supabase and triggers invite email

userStories.title: Client detail page
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/app/dashboard/clients/[id]/page.tsx renders client data
Page shows all client brief fields
Page includes sections for Drive folders and report embeds
Tabs or sections for Brief, Files, and Report are present

userStories.title: Branding settings page
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/app/dashboard/branding/page.tsx renders branding form
Logo upload, primary color, and accent color fields are available
Accent color field is locked on Starter tier with upgrade badge
Full brand kit is locked on Starter and Growth tiers with upgrade badge
Upgrade badge component renders correctly for locked features

userStories.title: Client portal overview page
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/app/portal/page.tsx renders activity feed with recent notifications
Quick links to files and reports are present

userStories.title: Client portal file browser
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/app/portal/files/page.tsx renders file browser UI
Folders (Assets, Reports, Deliverables) are displayed from drive_folders table
Clean native file browser UI is implemented

userStories.title: Client portal report viewer
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/app/portal/reports/page.tsx renders full-screen branded iframe embed from report_embeds table
Loading state is shown while iframe loads
Empty state is shown if no report is configured

userStories.title: Client portal notifications page
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/app/portal/notifications/page.tsx renders notification list scoped to the client
Mark as read functionality works and updates the notification record

userStories.title: White-label subdomain routing + CSS variable injection
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
Middleware detects subdomain from incoming request
Agency record is queried from agencies table by matching subdomain
Brand fields are injected as CSS variables into the layout
Plan tier gating correctly limits which brand fields are injected

userStories.title: Account settings page (both user types)
acceptanceCriteria: Build passes
src/app/dashboard/settings/page.tsx renders for agency users
src/app/portal/settings/page.tsx renders for client users
Password change form submits via Supabase auth updateUser
